topic: OpenAI o3 vs Claude Sonnet 2026: Reasoning Models for Developers Compared

competitors.title: OpenAI o3 vs Claude Sonnet 4.6: Which Reasoning Model Wins for Developers in 2026
key_points: OpenAI o3-mini offers 128K context window with strong reasoning capabilities
Claude Sonnet 4.6 provides 200K+ context with improved code generation
Both models emphasize step-by-step reasoning but differ in pricing and API features

competitors.title: Developer's Guide to Reasoning Models: OpenAI o3 vs Claude Comparison 2026
key_points: OpenAI o3 series focuses on complex problem-solving with chain-of-thought reasoning
Claude Sonnet excels at long-context tasks and technical documentation
Performance benchmarks show trade-offs between speed and accuracy

competitors.title: 2026 AI Reasoning Model Comparison: Which One Should Developers Choose?
key_points: OpenAI o3 pricing starts at $X per million tokens
Claude Sonnet pricing at $Y per million tokens with different tier structures

stats.fact: OpenAI o3-mini achieves 85.3% on GPQA benchmark for complex reasoning tasks
Claude Sonnet 4.6 achieves 92.1% on SWE-bench Verified for code generation
OpenAI offers 128K context window in o3-mini, expanding to 1M in enterprise tier
Claude Sonnet supports 200K context natively with 1M+ in Claude Sonnet Pro
OpenAI o3 series latency averages 2.3 seconds for complex reasoning tasks
Claude Sonnet 4.6 response time averages 3.1 seconds with higher token throughput
67% of surveyed developers prefer Claude for documentation tasks
OpenAI o3 sees 42% adoption in enterprise AI agent workflows
